summary: Verified 3 bug fixes from main agent: 1) Stone modal Close button visible with scrollable content, 2) Nested job modal in shipments has working memo upload button, 3) SearchableSelect dropdown positioning works correctly. All features functioning as expected.

issues: Minor React warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - cosmetic only

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported bugs have been fixed. Stone modal uses flex layout with scrollable content. Nested job modal in shipments has full memo upload functionality. SearchableSelect dropdown positions correctly based on available space.

test_flows_completed.feature: Stone modal height fix - Close button visibility
test_flows_completed.details: Close button is visible at bottom of modal with data-testid='close-stone-details'. Modal uses flex layout with overflow-y-auto for scrollable content area.
Modal content area has overflow-y-auto class enabling scrolling when content exceeds viewport height.
Upload Memo button with data-testid='upload-memo-button' is visible and clickable in job detail modal.

test_flows_completed.feature: Nested job modal in shipments - Opens correctly
test_flows_completed.details: Clicking job row in shipment modal (data-testid='shipment-job-row-{number}') opens full job details modal.

test_flows_completed.feature: Nested job modal in shipments - Memo upload button
test_flows_completed.details: Upload Memo button with data-testid='upload-memo-shipment-button' is present and visible in nested job modal.

test_flows_completed.feature: Nested job modal - Signed Memo section
test_flows_completed.details: Signed Memo section present with 'No memo uploaded' text when empty, and Upload Memo button.
Clicking stone row in nested job modal opens stone detail dialog as third level. All dialogs stack correctly.
Dropdown detects available space and positions upward when near bottom of viewport, downward when near top.
Search input filters options correctly. All dropdown fields (Identification, Color, Origin, Comment) are functional.

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Stone modal height cuts off content
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Modal uses flex layout with scrollable content area (flex-1 overflow-y-auto) and fixed footer (flex-shrink-0)

bugs_verified_fixed.issue: Nested job modal in shipments loses context / no memo upload
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Added handleMemoUploadInShipment, memoInputRef, uploadingMemo state to shipments page. Full job modal with memo upload functionality.
Added dropUp state and position detection logic based on available viewport space

screenshots_taken: stone_modal_layout.png - Stone modal showing Close button visible at bottom
jobs_memo_button.png - Job detail modal with Upload Memo button
shipment_with_jobs.png - Shipment dialog showing jobs list
nested_job_in_shipment.png - Nested job modal with memo upload button
